body.default: Our capabilities span the full lifecycle of a surface project — from material selection and custom fabrication to professional installation and aftercare.

default.title: Residential Projects
default.body: Kitchen countertops, bathroom vanities, feature walls, and custom furniture surfaces — crafted to exact specification for homeowners and interior designers.

default.title: Commercial Installations
default.body: Reception counters, office workstations, retail fitouts, and hospitality surfaces — delivered to commercial schedules with minimal disruption.

default.title: Custom Fabrication
default.body: Our in-house fabrication workshop handles complex shapes, curved edges, integrated sinks, and bespoke design elements with precision CNC and hand-finishing.

default.title: After-Sales & Maintenance
default.body: Dedicated maintenance support, repair services, and care guides to protect your investment for the long term after every installation.
